description: NumPy is the fundamental package for scientific computing in Python: arrays, linear algebra, random number generation.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/numpy && python3 numpy.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/numpy && python3 numpy.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/numpy && python3 numpy.py --help`. Fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the ai category. Fits when the engagement needs: Fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.
